creator: net@arrishq.net
text:
Hello :)

small addition to prevent any confusion:

mount -t nullfs -o ...

works as expected.

mount_nullfs -o ...

doesn't. So my guess is that the "mount_nullfs" binary doesn't like
some options.

Kindest regards
